validators.float: Must be a valid decimal number
validators.tristate: Value must be true, false, or unset
validators.time: Invalid datetime format. Use ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ
validators.fileMode: Must be octal format (3-4 digits, each 0-7). Example: 755
validators.urlArray: All URLs must be valid and start with http:// or https://
validators.bandwidth: Invalid bandwidth format. Use: 10M, 1G, 100K or combinations

remoteName.invalidStart: Remote name cannot start with dash or space
remoteName.invalidEnd: Remote name cannot end with space

password.minLength: Password must be at least 3 characters

operations.toggleCryptcheck: Toggle Crypt Check as Quick Action
operations.toggleCopyurl: Toggle Copy URL as Quick Action

stats.emptyMessage: Statistics will be shown when an operation is running

rcloneUpdate.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel Rclone update download.
rcloneUpdate.manualRestartRequired: Rclone was updated on the remote server. Please restart the remote rclone service manually to apply the new version.

alerts.title: Alerts & Notifications
alerts.clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all alert history? This action cannot be undone.
alerts.deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this alert rule?
alerts.deleteActionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this action?
alerts.noHistoryDesc: All your past notifications and events will be listed here.
alerts.testActionError: An error occurred while testing the alert action: {{error}}

rule.eventFilterHint: Leave empty to match all event types.
rule.remoteFilterHint: Leave empty to match all remotes.
rule.originFilterHint: Leave empty to match any origin source.
rule.backendFilterHint: Monitor events only on specific backends.
rule.profileFilterHint: Monitor events only for specific profiles.
rule.autoAcknowledgeHint: Automatically mark alerts as acknowledged. Ideal for alerts that already trigger system notifications.
rule.actionRequired: At least one action is required.
rule.noActionsHint: You need to create an alert action first before you can assign it to a rule.
rule.filtersEmptyHint: Leave empty to match all events.

action.noActionsCreated: No alert actions have been created yet.
action.os_toast_info: No additional configuration required for OS Native Notifications. It will use the standard system notification subsystem.
action.telegram_info: You can find your Bot Token from @BotFather and your Chat ID from @userinfobot.

resetAll.title: Reset Settings
resetAll.message: Are you sure you want to reset all app settings? This cannot be undone.

tray_enabled.label: Enable Tray Icon
tray_enabled.description: Show an icon in the system tray. Also enables the background service.

language.label: Language
language.description: Language to use for the user interface. System language is used by default.

start_on_startup.label: Start on Startup
start_on_startup.description: Automatically start the app when the system starts.

restrict.label: Restrict Values
restrict.description: Restrict some specific values for security purposes (e.g., Token, Client ID, etc.)

standalone_dialogs.label: Detached Dialogs
standalone_dialogs.description: Open dialog boxes (modals) in separate native OS windows.

max_tray_items.label: Max Tray Items
max_tray_items.description: Maximum number of items to show in the tray (1-40).

connection_check_urls.label: Connectivity Check URLs
connection_check_urls.description: List of URLs used to verify internet connectivity. The app checks these URLs periodically.

rclone_binary.label: Rclone Binary Path
rclone_binary.description: Path to rclone binary file. Leave empty for auto-detection.

rclone_flags.label: Additional Rclone Flags
rclone_flags.description: Add extra flags to the rclone process (e.g., --cache-dir=/path/to/cache). Some flags are reserved.

rclone_env_vars.label: Rclone Environment Variables
rclone_env_vars.description: Add custom environment variables to rclone processes. Format: KEY=VALUE (e.g., RCLONE_NO_UPDATE_MODTIME=true).

bandwidth_limit.label: Bandwidth Limit
bandwidth_limit.description: Limit the bandwidth used by Rclone transfers. Format: 'upload:download'

completed_onboarding.label: Completed Onboarding
completed_onboarding.description: Whether the user has completed the onboarding process

log_level.label: Log Level
log_level.description: Controls which log messages are recorded. Higher levels include more detail.

destroy_window_on_close.label: Memory Optimization
destroy_window_on_close.description: Destroys the window UI when closed to free RAM. Experimental feature.

app_skipped_updates.label: Skipped App Updates
app_skipped_updates.description: List of application versions that have been skipped.

rclone_skipped_updates.label: Skipped Rclone Updates
rclone_skipped_updates.description: List of rclone versions that have been skipped.

dashboard_layout.label: Dashboard Layout
dashboard_layout.description: Custom layout configuration for the dashboard.

dashboard_card_variant.label: Remote Card Display Mode
dashboard_card_variant.description: Default display variant for remote cards in overview panels.

starred.label: Starred Items
starred.description: List of starred files and folders in the file browser.

bookmarks.label: Bookmarks
bookmarks.description: List of bookmarked locations for quick access.

development.title: Development Build
development.subtitle: Features may be unstable • Data loss possible • Not for production use

flatpak.title: Flatpak Note
flatpak.subtitle: Some features may require manual permission adjustments.

metered.message: You are on a metered connection. Some features may use extra data.

password.title: Rclone Configuration Password Required
password.subtitle: Please unlock your configuration to start the engine

path.title: Rclone Binary Not Found
path.subtitle: Please check your rclone installation path in settings

generic.title: Engine Failed to Start
generic.subtitle: Please check logs for more details

connection.online: Your internet connection is working properly.
connection.offline: Cannot connect to: {{services}}. Some features may not work as expected. Click to retry.

welcome.title: Welcome to RClone Manager
welcome.content: Your modern cloud storage management solution. RClone Manager provides an intuitive interface to sync, mount, and manage all your cloud remotes effortlessly.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.content: Seamlessly sync files, mount cloud storage as local drives, manage multiple remotes, and monitor transfer operations - all from one beautiful interface.

installRclone.title: Install Rclone
installRclone.content: Rclone is required for cloud storage operations. Choose your preferred installation location or binary location and we'll handle the setup automatically.

installPlugin.title: Install Mount Plugin
installPlugin.content: The mount plugin enables you to mount cloud storage as local drives. This optional component enhances your Rclone experience.

selectConfig.title: Select Rclone Config
selectConfig.content: Choose the Rclone configuration file to use: the default location or a custom configuration file.

passwordRequired.title: Configuration Password Required
passwordRequired.content: Your rclone configuration is encrypted. Please enter the password to unlock it for this session.

ready.title: Ready to Go!
ready.content: Everything is set up and ready to use. RClone Manager will help you manage your cloud storage with ease. Click 'Get Started' to begin your journey.

validation.completeInstallation: Please complete the installation options above
validation.selectConfig: Please select or provide a valid config option first

errors.invalidPath: Please enter a valid absolute path

default.description: Use the default rclone config file location.
default.recommendation: Select this if you don't have a custom config.

custom.description: Select a custom rclone config file.
custom.label: Config File

actions.resolveOverwriteMessage: The file '{{name}}' exists on both source and destination but differs. Do you want to overwrite the file on destination with the source file?

empty.activeHint: Transfers will appear here when an operation starts
empty.recentHint: Completed transfers will appear here when jobs finish
empty.recentHintCheck: Checked files will appear here when the job completes

overviewHeader.backendSwitchAria: Current mode: {{title}} - Click to switch backend

vfsControl.title: VFS Control
vfsControl.noVfsRunning: No VFS instances are running for this remote.
vfsControl.indexedWarning: This VFS instance has an index suffix (e.g., {{suffix}}) which is not supported by rclone's VFS API. This is a known limitation when multiple mounts exist for the same remote.

queue.title: Upload Queue
queue.emptyHint: Files are uploaded automatically based on VFS cache mode
queue.name: Name

cacheInfo.title: Cache Information
cacheInfo.noteText: "Clear Metadata" only removes directory listings cache. Cached files remain in the cache directory until rclone purges them automatically.

advancedConfig.title: Advanced Configuration
advancedConfig.searchPlaceholder: Filter by option name or value...

jsonEditor.noFields: No fields to display in JSON mode
jsonEditor.parseError: Invalid JSON syntax. Please check your formatting.
jsonEditor.cliArgumentWithSuggestion: CLI-style arguments (like '{{key}}') are not supported in rclone RC. Did you mean '{{suggestion}}'?
jsonEditor.camelCaseSuggestionWarning: Option '{{key}}' is not valid in this format. Did you mean '{{suggestion}}'?
jsonEditor.wrongBlockWarning: Option(s) {{keys}} belong to the '{{block}}' configuration block and may not work here.
jsonEditor.unknownWarning: Unknown option(s): {{keys}}. These might be ignored by rclone.
jsonEditor.invalidArrayPath: Property '{{key}}' does not support multiple paths. Please provide a single string path instead.

cliImport.title: Import from CLI
cliImport.description: Paste your rclone command line string below. We will parse it and configure your profile options.
cliImport.macroDesc: The backend will resolve these values at runtime when starting the job. Supported macros: date, date +FORMAT, hostname, user, os.
cliImport.wrongBlockGuidance: Option belongs to the '{{block}}' configuration block and is not supported in {{verb}} profile.
cliImport.invalidCommand: Invalid rclone command. Please provide a command with a supported operation (e.g. sync, copy, mount) or flags.
cliImport.patchInfo: No operation (sync, serve, or mount) was specified. The imported flags will be applied as a patch directly to your active configuration profile(s).
cliImport.patchInfoRemoteStep: No operation (sync, serve, or mount) was specified. To apply these flags as a patch, please navigate to a specific configuration step (e.g., Sync, Mount, or Serve) instead of the Remote step.

obscure.title: Obscure Password
obscure.description: Obscures a clear string using rclone's standard obscuring algorithm so it can be safely saved to configuration files or parameters.
obscure.resultHelp: Click the copy button and paste this value where needed.

remoteConfig.invalidStart: Name cannot start with a dash or space
remoteConfig.invalidEnd: Name cannot end with a space
remoteConfig.nameTaken: A remote with this name already exists
remoteConfig.unknownTopLevelProperty: Warning: '{{key}}' is not a standard top-level property for this profile and might be ignored.

jsonEditorInfo.sync: Sync/Copy/Move Profile: Set 'srcFs' and 'dstFs' paths, profile-level fields, and place all rclone flags inside '_config'.
jsonEditorInfo.bisync: Bisync Profile: Set 'path1' and 'path2' paths, profile-level fields, and place all rclone flags inside '_config'.
jsonEditorInfo.check: Check Profile: Set 'srcFs' and 'dstFs' paths, profile-level fields, and place all check flags inside '_config'.
jsonEditorInfo.mount: Mount Profile: Set 'fs' and 'mountPoint' paths, 'mountType', profile-level fields, and place all mount options inside 'mountOpt'.
jsonEditorInfo.serve: Serve Profile: Set 'fs' path, 'serveType', profile-level fields, and place all serve options inside '_config'.
jsonEditorInfo.vfs: VFS Profile: Set custom Virtual File System caching, buffering, and compatibility options as key-value pairs.
jsonEditorInfo.filter: Filter Profile: Set glob patterns, inclusion/exclusion rules, and file filtering options as key-value pairs.
jsonEditorInfo.backend: Backend Profile: Configure advanced protocol options and remote-specific connection settings as key-value pairs.
jsonEditorInfo.runtimeRemote: Runtime Remote: Set dynamic connection overrides and performance tweaks as key-value pairs.

runtimeRemoteWarning.title: Runtime Remote Settings
runtimeRemoteWarning.description: These settings are used to dynamically override connection properties or apply performance tweaks when interacting with this remote at runtime. They are not stored in the persistent rclone.conf file. If any of these fields contain sensitive values such as passwords or API keys, they must be manually obscured using rclone's obscure algorithm before saving; plain text values will not be accepted by rclone for such fields.

remoteConfig.emptyStateDesc: Pick a provider to start configuring your new remote connection.
remoteConfig.setupSubtitle: Complete the setup for this remote
remoteConfig.nextQuestionHelp: Answer the next question to continue.
remoteConfig.serveDescription: Select the remote path you want to serve. You can serve the entire remote or a specific folder.
remoteConfig.operationDescription: Configure source, destination, and auto-start options for this operation.

allowOtherWarning.title: FUSE Configuration Required
allowOtherWarning.description: Enabling '--allow-other' requires configuring /etc/fuse.conf on the host system to avoid mount failures. Please ensure 'user_allow_other' is uncommented/enabled in /etc/fuse.conf.

obscure.label: Obscure
obscure.description: Treat passwords as plain text and obscure them before saving to config

noObscure.label: No Obscure
noObscure.description: Passwords are already obscured — skip the obscuring step

nonInteractive.label: Non-Interactive
nonInteractive.description: Return a JSON question blob instead of prompting; for app-driven config flows

all.label: All Questions
all.description: Ask every config question, not just the post-config subset

noOutput.label: No Output
noOutput.description: Suppress any stdout output from the RC config call

appOperation.multiSourceOneWayInfo: Multiple source paths detected. One-way checking has been automatically enabled to ensure rclone verifies each source against the destination.
appOperation.watchDescription: Watch local source directories for file modifications and sync changes automatically.
appOperation.watchRequiresLocalSource: Real-time monitoring requires at least one local source directory.
appOperation.watchRequiresLocal: Real-time monitoring requires at least one local source or destination directory.
appOperation.watchMixedSourcesNote: Only local source directories will be monitored in real-time. Changes on remote sources will not trigger sync automatically.
appOperation.watchFilterNote: The file watcher respects your Filter Profile. Changes to files or directories that match your exclusions (e.g. by pattern, size, or age) will not trigger a sync.
appOperation.scheduleDescription: When enabled, this operation will run recurring based on the cron schedule below.
appOperation.copyUrlFileSettingsWarning: Custom filenames are set individually per URL row above. Any row with an empty filename will use auto-determined names.
appOperation.mountDestMustBeLocal: Mount destination must be a local folder
appOperation.completionNote: Remote path completion available after creation of the remote.
appOperation.coreCommandNote: This operation runs as a CLI command via rclone rather than using the native transfer API. These are not works like native API operations. Some bugs, performance issues, missing progress updates (like ETA, throughput) may occur.
appOperation.noItemsFound: No items found in this directory.
appOperation.advancedHelp: Configure individual cron fields or enter a complete cron expression manually.
appOperation.timezoneNote: Times are in your local timezone (UTC{{timezone}}) and automatically converted to UTC for scheduling.

restore.title: Restore Backup

legacy.title: Legacy Backup Detected
legacy.description: This backup was created before the profile system was introduced. It will be restored to the 'default' profile.

restore.encryptedWarning: This backup is encrypted. Enter the correct password to decrypt and restore.

errors.passwordEmpty: Password cannot be empty or whitespace

errors.verificationFailed: File verification failed. The backup may be corrupted.
errors.requiresPassword: This backup requires a password to decrypt.
errors.decryptFailed: Failed to decrypt backup. Check your password.

updates.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel the update download.
updates.installSuccess: Update installed. Please restart the app.

appDetail.sharedSettingsDesc: Applies to all operations, regardless of sync or mount mode.
appDetail.syncBehave: Adjust how the {{op}} process behaves. Multi-profile supported.
appDetail.copyUrlDesc: Generate public download URLs for files
appDetail.archivecreateDesc: Compress folders/files into an archive (Zip, Tar, etc.)
appDetail.serveBehave: Configure serving protocols (HTTP, FTP, etc). Multi-profile supported.
appDetail.mountBehave: Configure mount behavior and virtual file system tuning.
appDetail.dryRunActive: Dry run is active — no changes will be made

shutdown.title: Shutting Down
shutdown.message: Please wait while the application shuts down safely...

actionSelection.title: Configure Quick Actions
actionSelection.description: Choose which actions to display as buttons on the remote dashboard for {{name}}. Star up to {{max}} actions, and drag to change their order.

about.title: About
about.restartDescription: An update has been installed. Please restart the application to apply the changes.
about.rcloneRestartDescription: An Rclone update has been installed. Please restart the engine to apply the changes.
about.ackText: This application is built with modern web technologies and relies on the excellent Rclone project for cloud storage management.
about.managedBuildNotice: This build cannot be updated by the app updater. Please install updates manually.
about.licenseText1: This application is free and open source software distributed under the
about.licenseText2: This program comes with no warranty. You are free to use, modify, and distribute this software according to the GPL v3 license terms.
about.thirdPartyText: This application includes various third-party libraries and components, each with their own licensing terms. See the project repository for a complete list.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.readyToRestartDesc: The following changes require an engine restart to take effect:

validation.integer: Must be a valid whole number.

aria.resetAll: Reset all settings to default values

preferences.pendingChangesTooltip: You have {{count}} unsaved changes that require engine restart. Click to scroll to them.

export.profilesHint: Select specific profiles to include in the backup.

backend.title: Backend Management

oauthHost.label: OAuth Host
oauthHost.description: Host to connect to for OAuth callbacks. Must be a routable address — never a wildcard like 0.0.0.0. In Docker, set this to the container's accessible hostname.
